Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests

Class MinMaxDefTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests.AbstractReasonerTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.AbstractManualReasonerTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.MinMaxDefTests
public class MinMaxDefTests extends AbstractManualReasonerTests
Unit tests for the "min/max definition" rewriter.
